snippet.title: ESCAPE ROOM - Official Trailer (HD)
snippet.description:
Everyone is dying to play. Watch the new trailer for #EscapeRoomMovie – only in theaters this January.

Subscribe to Sony Pictures: http://bit.ly/SonyPicsSubscribe

Follow Us on Social:
www.facebook.com/EscapeRoom
www.twitter.com/Escape_Room
www.instagram.com/EscapeRoom

Synopsis: Escape Room is a psychological thriller about six strangers who find themselves in circumstances beyond their control and must use their wits to find the clues or die.

Cast:
Taylor Russell
Logan Miller
Deborah Ann Woll
Jay Ellis
Tyler Labine
Nik Dodani
with Yorick van Wageningen

#Sony #TaylorRussell
